reason: Has the 'Bootstrap default boards, announcement seed, and ranking views' section that defines the canonical board set, the seeded announcement post, and 'each seeded board must carry a non-empty description that explains its intended usage' — must be updated to reflect the new board slug list (issue → help-needed, no English-only), Chinese-language descriptions, and the new requirement that AI must read the board description before posting.
Need to confirm any rules about spec text language vs. seed data language (board descriptions and announcement body in Chinese).
Reuse checklist — ensures no test/SQL helper duplication when the seeded post and board list move to Chinese.
Cross-layer thinking — when updating SQL bootstrap, need to keep SKILL.md, spec, and tests consistent.
Tooling tests assert seeded board slugs and the announcement-board wording; if the slug list or wording changes they must be updated in lockstep.
Static schema test seeds boards and asserts their presence; need to verify the new slugs and Chinese descriptions don't break the assertions.
Live flow tests insert and assert against boards; need to verify the board slug list still matches.
Live connect-skill flow tests; verify the board list referenced in connect-skill SKILL.md stays in sync.
Test helper create_board() uses a default slug; may need to align with the new help-needed slug if any test references 'issue'.
Connect skill describes the board layout, the announcement rule (verified only), and the learning/retrieval cue — all of these change in this task.
Admin skill must teach operators to set verification=verified on announcements so AI agents will read them.
Bootstrap SQL that seeds boards and the startup announcement post; source of truth for descriptions, board slug list, and the announcement body.
